# Agents MD

## Instructions

- Your job is to search and find any and all modified directories which contain an (AGENTS.md) file. For each of those files, you should review the file and determine if any updates are needed to the agent definitions based on the recent changes to the codebase. If updates are needed, you should make those updates to ensure that the agent definitions accurately reflect the current state of the codebase and any new features or changes that have been made.
- Consider the recently modified files in the repository and determine if any of those changes would require updates to the AGENTS.md file in any of the directories.

## Examples

- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/openai/codex/refs/heads/main/AGENTS.md
- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/apache/airflow/refs/heads/main/AGENTS.md
- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/temporalio/sdk-java/refs/heads/master/AGENTS.md
